summary: 0.6.45 restores the correct local transform basis for demo3 side controls and makes the shuffle and A-B loop toggles reflect live checked state through Trigger.value.
operatorSignals: The 0.6.44 scene ingest preserved the new controls, but the side-screen control transforms had snapped back toward the middle basis.
When A and B were set and the loop started, the new A-B toggle did not show checked state, and shuffle state still only seemed visible through text.
actionsTaken: Changed the builder to preserve the center atom local transform fields before reparenting side control clones.
Added Trigger.value for shuffle and A-B loop toggles in the deterministic scene builder.
Extended runtime demo scene readback to drive those toggle values from live player state.
nonGoals: No new slideshow or image-slider behavior in this slice.
No interactive A-B toggle enable-disable behavior yet; that remains the next runtime seam.
